chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS First Appeal No.S-42 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.386/ 2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 17-03-2026. Rana Raheel Mehmood Rajput advocate for the appellant. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G. = This matter was partly heard on 26-02-2026 and 05-03-2026 and then was fixed for today. None present for the respondent despite repeated notices were issued. Learned counsel for the appellant has concluded his arguments. For the reasons to follow, instant 1st Appeal is allowed; resultantly impugned Judgment and Decree dated 23-11-2017 passed in Summary Suit No. 02 of 2016 by the learned Additional District Judge-II, Mirpurkhas is hereby set aside and matter is remanded back to the learned trial Court for decision afresh based on evidence produced by the parties in said Summary Suit No. 02/ 2016 within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of this Order and copy of the Judgment be filed with the Additional Registrar of this Court in compliance of this Order. The instant 1st Appeal alongwith listed pending application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE *Saleem* 2
